description: A Class C artifact whose action_policy sets action_allowed=true without declaring an authorization_source MUST be rejected as INVALID. Authorization must be separately governable and its source preserved as auditable metadata (AG2/AG3).

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 invariants AG2 and AG3: execution authorization MUST remain separately governable, and a conformant implementation MUST preserve execution policy, execution rationale, AND authorization source as auditable metadata. The action_policy above sets action_allowed=true but omits authorization_source entirely — there is no auditable record of who or what authorized the action. A conformant verifier MUST reject the artifact as INVALID. AG3 makes authorization_source a structural requirement whenever action_allowed is true; absence is non-conformant regardless of consensus state.
